Pseudospirituality is a phenomenon where people develop an identity around [[spirituality]] and attempt to pursue it for superficial aesthetic reasons.

This phenomenon is endemic in [[new age]] and in the western world has rendered discussion of [[dharmic religions]] often nearly impossible among a lay audience

It is unclear whether it should be considered a [[Hydroplane]] in itself or merely a lack of education.

Avoiding terms corrupted by pseudospirituality is a major reason for the [[Great Relexification]] of 2022.

== Pseudomaterialism ==
Pseudomaterialism is the opposite, it is [[mysticism]] which takes on materialistic aesthetics. This is the reason why [[Immanuelle]] talks about hentai so much

== See also ==

* [[just world hypothesis]]

[[Category:Hydroplanes]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Pseudospirituality]][[sn:Pseudospirituality]][[Category:New Age]]
[[Category:Pages]]
